title: 宝塚記念の後に・導く者

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I win the Takarazuka Kinen. But more and more
people are saying I'm not princess-like...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter! I'm pursuing the ideal princess I
envision—one that I can be proud of! Yeah,
Vodka knows what I'm talking about!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My next challenge is the Queen Elizabeth II Cup.
There are still people saying I'm not fit to be
queen, but that's no problem!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My peers are all pursuing their own ideal selves,
so I must face them by staying true to mine! Time
to grapple with my Princess☆Armlock!
